text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Part D Formulary File Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 2.2 3 

COPAY 

LABEL: Copay 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary copayment amount for the drug products covered by the Part D 
Senior Savings (PDSS) model. The insulin drug products (represented by the FRMLRY_RX_ID) covered 
as part of the PDSS have a different payment structure than other insulins (or other drug products) on 
the formulary. 

SHORT NAME:
